title: Big Globe - Remove Big Globe Structures
description: Dapack/Mod that remove all Big Globe structures in Big Globe mod
body:
This is a simple mod/datapack that will remove all the custom structures from [Big Globe](https://modrinth.com/mod/big-globe)

To remove all the Vanilla type structures go check out my other mod/dapack [Big Globe - Remove Vanilla Structures](https://modrinth.com/datapack/big-globe-remove-vanilla-structures).

<details>
<summary>List of structure removed</summary>

- abandoned city
- bigger desert pyramid
- campfire
- large dungeon
- large house
- log cabin
- medium dungeon
- medium house
- portal temple
- portal temple cracked
- small dungeon
- small house
- soul campfire
- well
- windmill

</details>
